summary: Themes UI exposes the three Phase 2 audience presets, refetches against the new API, and renders excluded-by-label breakdowns with disabled CTA states.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Three preset filters
checks.command: rg -n "End-user only|Include seller|Include brand" frontend/src/pages/ThemesPage.tsx frontend/dist/assets/*.js
checks.actual: Built UI contains End-user only, Include seller, and Include brand

checks.name: CHECK-02: Filter switch refetches themes
checks.command: Review handleFilterChange in ThemesPage and compare API outputs
checks.expected: Switching preset triggers new themes request
checks.actual: handleFilterChange calls loadThemes(nextFilter), and API outputs changed from 31 to 33 to 39 included posts across presets

checks.name: CHECK-03: Excluded-by-label summary shown
checks.expected: excluded by label and breakdown visible
checks.actual: ThemesPage renders excluded_by_label_count and excluded_breakdown chips

checks.name: CHECK-04: CTA disabled while loading
checks.expected: Load and filter buttons disable during request
checks.actual: Load Themes button disables on isLoading and filter chips also disable while loading

checks.name: CHECK-05: Default filter is End-user only
checks.actual: ThemesPage initializes audienceFilter state to end_user_only
